title: A Guru and Disciple conversation
description: Question: MAAsterG, should we be afraid of AI? MAAsterG: AI means Artificial Intelligence. First, we must understand what intelligence really is. Intelligence is the mind – what we call intellect. The mind stores thoughts. The intelligence that created human beings is called God or Super Intelligence (SI). This Super Intelligence created Real Intelligence (RI). Real intelligence is the body and the mind within it that stores experiences. When a child is born, the child carries Real Intelligence because it is […]

title: India’s ecosystem strategy in the global AI race
description: By Suhaib Bakshi bakshisuhaib094@gmail.com Artificial intelligence is rapidly emerging as one of the most consequential technologies shaping the global economy. For India, the central challenge is not only how to develop advanced AI systems but also how to ensure that the technology contributes meaningfully to economic growth, productivity and public services. Much of the global conversation around artificial intelligence has focused on the race to build ever larger frontier models, with major advances coming from countries such as the […]

title: Gilles Arsenault removed from P.E.I. cabinet
description: Gilles Arsenault has been removed as minister of economic development, trade and artificial intelligence and minister responsible for Acadian and francophone affairs, according to a statement by Premier Rob Lantz Saturday.
content:

title: Google Alters News Headlines Without Publisher Consent, Reports Indicate
description: Introduction Google has begun testing a feature that rewrites article headlines in its search results without seeking permission or notifying the original publishers, according to recent reports. [1] The experiment, which uses artificial intelligence to modify or summarize headlines, was announced in late March 2026 and has sparked immediate concern among media executives and industry […]

title: Global AI Confluence 2026 Unites Students for a Tech-Powered Future
description: Over 180 international students from 26 countries participated in India's 'Global Artificial Intelligence Confluence 2026.' The event focused on AI's socio-economic impact, ethical values, and global innovation. Experts emphasized creating indigenous AI models and discussed concerns like data privacy and misinformation. The conference concluded at Guru Gorakshnath Research Centre auditorium.
content: Over 180 international students from 26 countries gathered in India for the 'Global Artificial Intelligence Confluence 2026,' aiming to explore AI's innovation and socio-economic influence. The two-day event began on Friday, organized by the universi... [759 chars]

title: Wikipedia officially bans AI-generated encyclopedia entries
description: The internet’s favorite encyclopedia has officially banned its 260,000 human editors from using artificial intelligence to write articles — a major crackdown as so-called “AI slop” floods the web.
content:
Bots, be gone.
